popularStory.headline: John Maxwell
popularStory.description: Scottish politician Born c.1512 Died 1583 John Maxwell was the second son of Robert Maxwell, 4th Lord Maxwell (d. 1546). In 1547 he married Agnes (d. 1594), daughter of William Herries, 3rd Lord Herri …

zh.lifeSummary: John Maxwell是Robert Maxwell和Janet Douglas的兒子，於大約1512年出生。他於1548年3月18日之前與Agnes Herries結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1583年1月20日在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: John Maxwell was born about 1512 as the son of Robert Maxwell and Janet Douglas. He married Agnes Herries before 18 March 1548. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 20 January 1583, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: John Maxwell est né environ 1512, fils de Robert Maxwell et Janet Douglas. Il a épousé Agnes Herries avant 18 mars 1548. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 20 janvier 1583, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: John Maxwell wurde um 1512, als Sohn von Robert Maxwell und Janet Douglas geboren. Er hat vor 18. März 1548 Agnes Herries geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Januar 1583 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Maxwell è nato il circa 1512 come figlio di Robert Maxwell e Janet Douglas. Lui sposato Agnes Herries prima del 18 marzo 1548. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 20 gennaio 1583, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Maxwellは約1512年にRobert MaxwellとJanet Douglasの息子として生まれた。1548年3月18日以前にAgnes Herriesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1583年1月20日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンで72歳で死去し，スコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Maxwell(은)는 대략 1512년 Robert Maxwell(와)과 Janet Douglas의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1548년 3월 18일 이전 Agnes Herries(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1583년 1월 20일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Maxwell nasceu aproximadamente 1512 filho de Robert Maxwell e Janet Douglas. Ele casou-se com Agnes Herries antes 18 de março de 1548. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1583, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: John Maxwell родился около 1512 г. Его родителей звали Robert Maxwell и Janet Douglas. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Herries перед 18 марта 1548 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 20 января 1583 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: John Maxwell nació aproximadamente 1512 como hijo de Robert Maxwell y Janet Douglas. Se casó con Agnes Herries antes de 18 de marzo de 1548. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 20 de enero de 1583, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.
